Document:
# Guild Worker
Guild Workers are experienced members of the Mercenary Guild who have moved from fieldwork into operations. Instead of venturing out to fight monsters, Guild Workers keep the guild running — managing resources, tracking contracts, and making sure Adventurers have what they need before heading out.
## Responsibilities
- Manage guild resources and equipment storage - Track active contracts and missions - Prepare supplies and equipment for Adventurers - Coordinate logistics between the guild and the rest of the settlement - Handle administrative tasks the Guildmaster doesn't have time for
## Requirements
[bold]2 hours[/bold] as an Adventurer. Salary: [bold]50 coins[/bold] per cycle.
The colored beret identifies you as a Guild Worker — pick whichever color fits you.
## Tips
- Know what Adventurers need before they ask — healing items, tools, storage - A well-organized guild base makes the whole Mercenary department more effective - You have field experience from your time as an Adventurer — use it to give practical advice - Coordinate closely with the [bold]Guildmaster[/bold] on priorities and active contracts
